flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bishop State Community College are 13% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.9k vs $34.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bishop State Community College rose 81% between 2007 and 2010 (9.3% → 16.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bishop State Community College rose 41% between 2009 and 2010 (9.8% → 13.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bishop State Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.4k).
